title: Pocket Change
description: Collect a total of 100 coins across all your runs.

title: Casual Climber
description: Accumulate a total of 2,500 meters climbed.

title: Frequent Flyer
description: Land safely on 500 platforms cumulatively.

title: Marathon Survivor
description: Survive for a total of 300 seconds across all games.

title: Morning Routine
description: Play 3 games before 10:00 AM.

title: Combo King
description: Jump on 5 platforms in a row without falling back down or stopping.

title: Perfect Landing
description: Land exactly in the center of a platform 10 times in one game.

title: Gravity Explorer
description: Activate the Super Jump or Jetpack power-up 5 times.

title: Coin Magnetism
description: Collect 10 coins in a single non-stop jump.

title: Acrobat
description: Trigger 5 'Near Misses' across any number of games.

title: True Pacifist
description: Reach 1,500 meters without collecting a single coin.

title: Blind Jumper
description: Reach a score of 1,000 without picking up any power-ups.

title: Speed Runner
description: Climb past 1,000 meters in under 20 seconds.

title: Thread the Needle
description: Free-fall past 3 platforms in one drop and land safely on a 4th.

title: Living on the Edge
description: Land on the extreme edge of platforms 5 times in a single run.

title: Gravity Defier
description: Use 3 distinct power-ups in a single, high-stakes run.

title: Heart Attack
description: Successfully survive 10 'Near Misses' in a single life.

title: Untouchable
description: Survive for 60 seconds without collecting a coin, power-up, or taking a hit.

title: Leap of Faith
description: Perform a flawless blind drop of at least 800 meters and land precisely on the center of a platform.

title: The Floor Is Lava
description: Spend less than 0.5 seconds on each platform while climbing up to 2,000 meters.
